preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.5.0: Stripe read-only revenue integration (7 actions, OAuth-pinned read_only scope), Reddit organic growth (scan/draft/post/shadowban-check with 7-layer compliance preflight), streaming TTS (first-sentence latency cut from ~2-3s to ~400-700ms), universal RevenueSource abstraction so Shopify + Stripe + future billing connectors feed one topline, mobile approval queue stub on the landing worker (HMAC-signed), and a CI asar size ceiling to block the v1.3.0 bloat regression on both Windows and Mac builds.
whatsNew: Stripe integration (read-only): seven new actions — stripe-login, stripe-setup, stripe-revenue, stripe-subscriptions, stripe-cohorts, stripe-analytics, stripe-preference. OAuth scope pinned to read_only in TWO places (binary + worker re-verifies Stripe's echoed scope). No write verbs in source — enforced by a build-failing test that greps stripe.go. Topline preference configurable (shopify/stripe/both) when both connected.

Universal RevenueSource abstraction (dashboard.go): Shopify and Stripe both report through one RevenueSource{Name,Kind,Revenue,NewCustomers,MRR,ARR,ActiveSubs,ChurnPct} shape. pickRevenueSource disambiguates topline by cfg.RevenueSourcePreference. Adding future billing connectors (PayPal, Square, Recurly) is now one function + one case — no ad-hoc revenue fields.

Reddit organic prospecting: four new actions — reddit-prospect-scan (find relevant threads), reddit-prospect-draft (cluster + quality-gated replies), reddit-prospect-post (7-layer compliance preflight + /api/comment), reddit-shadowban-check (daily account health probe).

Two-stage quality gate on every Reddit draft: structural (40-300 words, no banned self-promo phrases, no shouting, thread-fit required) + optional AI score (Gemini authenticity/helpfulness/thread-fit/compliance). Fails closed on network errors.

Seven-layer Reddit compliance preflight on auto-posting: account ≥30 days old, combined karma ≥100, ≤5 posts / 24h, ≥120 min per-sub cadence, ≥300s global cadence, 72h body-hash dedup, cached shadowban check — all BEFORE /api/comment.

`redditPostMode: "draft-only"`: escape hatch for fresh accounts — skips the compliance gate, saves replies to results/reddit_draft_<ts>.txt for manual paste. When auto-mode blocks, the draft is auto-saved as fallback.

Streaming TTS: Claude's response is fed sentence-by-sentence as it streams, so the first complete sentence kicks off synthesis while Claude is still writing. Time-to-first-word drops from ~2-3s (old one-shot) to ~400-700ms. Short fragments coalesce to avoid choppy playback. 20 new sentence-splitter tests pin the streaming logic.

Mobile approval queue stub on the landing worker: HMAC-signed /api/approval/{enqueue,:id,:id/decide,pending}. Ships live today for the Electron approval card; the iOS/Android surface uses the same endpoints when v2.0 mobile lands. 41 new worker tests cover signature verification, fail-closed secret handling, double-decide 409s, and oversized-body truncation.

CI asar size ceiling (300 MB, Windows + Mac): guards against the v1.3.0 regression that shipped a 568 MB asar because voice tools double-packed. A bloated asar was breaking auto-update sha256 checks and pushing low-RAM machines into OOM during downloadAndApplyUpdate.

Rate-limit preflight hardening: NextSlotNano-based monotonic slot reservation replaces LastCall arithmetic, fixing a same-platform parallel fan-out race where two callers could reserve the same wire slot. Sleep-under-preflightMu is now an audited invariant — all Locked functions return a duration to sleep after unlock.

Hook blocklist tightened: every pattern for a critical file (.vault, .rate-state, .rate-secret, .merlin-config, .merlin-vault, .merlin-ratelimit, .merlin-audit, .merlin-tokens) now matches atomic-write siblings (.bak, .tmp, .tmp.N) via (\.|$) instead of $.
